programme.desc: Australia heads to Adelaide 1-0 up in the series but will face an England side with a fresh, new-look attack for the pink ball Test.

programme.desc: Travis Head had a knock to remember in Brisbane and he's now playing like he belongs in the Australian side. He'll be keen to cash in in Adelaide, too.

programme.title: The Ashes AUS v ENG 2nd Test Day 4
programme.desc: England managed to get back into the contest at the Gabba after a horrible opening day, but collapsed again on Day 4. Will they be up for the fight today?

programme.title: The Ashes AUS v ENG 3rd Test Day 2
programme.desc: The last time England were here, the only match they salvaged anything other than a loss was a draw in Melbourne, thanks to a 244* from Alastair Cook.

programme.title: The Ashes AUS v ENG 3rd Test Day 1
programme.desc: The biggest day on Australia's cricketing calendar is here. How will England handle the pressure of the Boxing Day Test at the MCG?

programme.title: The Ashes AUS v ENG 3rd Test Day 2
programme.desc: The last time England were here, the only match they salvaged anything other than a loss was a draw in Melbourne, thanks to a 244* from Alastair Cook.

programme.title: The Ashes AUS v ENG 3rd Test Day 3
programme.desc: Day 3 resumes from the Melbourne Cricket Ground and it marks the halfway point of the 2021/22 Ashes series. Who has the upper hand?

programme.title: The Ashes AUS v ENG 4th Test Day 1
programme.desc: Pat Cummins will lead the Aussies out onto the SCG in what will be his first home Test match as captain. Expect the champion to be firing with the ball.

programme.title: The Ashes AUS v ENG 4th Test Day 2
programme.desc: Steve Smith become the joint second-fastest batsman to score 6,000 runs last time he played England here. He's added almost 2000 runs since that Test.

programme.title: The Ashes AUS v ENG 4th Test Day 3
programme.desc: Jane McGrath Day will see a sea of pink across the SCG in what is one of the great sights in world sport. It's a day where cause transcends the sport.

programme.title: The Ashes AUS v ENG 4th Test Day 4
programme.desc: Will the fourth Test go the distance in Sydney? Day 4 will be the critical day in terms of knowing if a result occurs, or is likely on the final day.

programme.title: The Ashes AUS v ENG 4th Test Day 5
programme.desc: The last time England were in Sydney they copped an innings and 123 run loss, taking only seven wickets for the match. Selecting the right bowlers is key.

programme.title: 2022 Pro Breaking Tour Invitational
programme.desc: Pro Breaking Tour is a series of professional breaking competitions. Pro Breaking Tour continues to lead the way this yearwith events spanning from New York to San Diego.

programme.title: Excel Esports: All-Star Battle
programme.desc: This one-of-a-kind game show portrays 8 expert modelers trying to solve an original game task about lottery reels in Microsoft Excel. The goal is to answer as many questions as possible in a limited amount of time.

programme.title: 2022 New Swarm FlingGolf Classic
programme.desc: FlingGolf players from across the US compete at the American Classic Golf Club in two events: the course-play New Swarm Open and the Longest FlingShot Championship.

programme.title: Teqball
programme.desc: Teqball is the world's fastest growing sport with its concept, soccer meets table tennis. The game is played with 2 or 4 players with the uniquely curved TEQ table. In a match, players compete in best-of-three sets to 12 points.

programme.title: 2022 eSkootr Championship
programme.desc: eSC London was the inaugural round of the eSkootr Championship? - the world's first electric scooter racing series. Show casing a new and exciting sport, with men and women racing against each other.

programme.title: 2022 Noblesville Bed Races
programme.desc: Few sports let you lie down on the job, and none of them are as exciting as bed racing. Pitting young against old, police against firemen, see the spectacle of souped-up sleepers sprinting their way to glory.

programme.title: Meeker's Baddest Bencher on the Planet
programme.desc: On May 14, 2022 from Kingwood, Texas, Tiny Meeker presents The Baddest Bencher on the Planet II. Every lifter attempted more than 1000 pounds! Tune in to see which bencher can take home the title of "The Baddest Bencher".

programme.title: 2022 Corunna Belt Sander Races
programme.desc: To compete in this sport, you'll need grit, especially against some of the roughest competition around. Watch these tricked-out tools tear up the track to a smooth finish in the annual Corunna Belt Sander Races.

programme.title: World Axe Throwing League
programme.desc: The Commissioner of WATL, Mike Morton, and the Commissioner of the World Knife Throwing League, Evan Walters, are hosting an invitational tournament for ESPN: 'The Ocho' on August 5th!

programme.title: Pogopalooza Cup 2022
programme.desc: The planet's top extreme pogo stick athletes will throw down flips and tricks 10 feet in the air, over and off of obstacles to try and claim the title of World's Best Pogoer and bring home the coveted Pogopalooza Cup!

programme.title: USA Pickleball Championship
programme.desc: The USA Pickleball National Championships, held last year at the world-class Indian Wells Tennis Garden, is the sport's pinnacle event.

programme.title: OmegaBall Invitational
programme.desc: OmegaBall is a new, fast-paced sport, based on the fundamentals of soccer that features THREE TEAMS AT ONCE, on a circular field. There are three goals, no throw-ins (free kicks only) five players per team and no offsides!

programme.title: 2022 BullShooter Invitational Shootout
programme.desc: See the top dart players in the world go for it all, as they compete for the first-ever BullShooter Invitational Shootout. These 32 incredibly talented dart players will compete in the game of 501 Open In/ Double Out, Split Bull.

programme.title: US Air Guitar All-Star Air-Off
programme.desc: Five of the greatest US Air Guitar champions go head to head in an epic, four-round elimination battle. Including reigning and past national champs and one wild-card veteran.

programme.title: US Quadball Invitational
programme.desc: Quadball is a full-contact, mixed-gender sport with elements of rugby, dodgeball, and flag football. Watch the US National Quadball Team take on their developmental squad, the USNT Futures.

programme.title: Death Diving: Austin
programme.desc: Get ready for the biggest international death diving competition the USA has ever seen. For the first time the International Dods Federation is teaming up with The Cliff Cruise to bring you Dods Challenge Austin.

programme.title: ACL SuperHole
